opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Adult child, bystander] He clutched his chest, fell to the floor, and now he won't wake up and is making gasping noises!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden collapse with loss of consciousness and abnormal breathing after chest pain.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden collapse a few minutes ago
symptom_narrative.character: complete unresponsiveness with only occasional irregular gasping breaths
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: [Bystander] He said his chest hurt badly right before he collapsed
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: unknown — bystander unsure of full medical history

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adult child present, extremely distressed, has already called 000

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: bystander desperately wants to know what to do right now

access_barriers.transport: not applicable — emergency services already required on scene
